login.subtitle: Access your PIVOT workspace
login.device_sent: A verification code was sent to your email.
login.error_not_verified: Your email is not verified yet. Check your inbox.

login.error_google_not_configured: Google Sign-In is not configured in this environment.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join PIVOT Platform
register.success_body: Check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
register.success_no_email: Didn't receive it? Check your spam or
register.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Try again in {{ time }}.

resend.title: Resend activation email
resend.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a new activation link.
resend.sent_body: If this email matches an unverified account, an activation link has been sent.

verify_email.success_body: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verify_email.error_body: This link has expired or has already been used. Request a new link from the login page.

forgot_password.title: Forgot password
forgot_password.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgot_password.sent_body: If this email matches a PIVOT account, you will receive a reset link within a few minutes.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.subtitle: Choose a secure password.
reset_password.expired_body: This reset link is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
reset_password.success_body: You can now sign in with your new password.

device_confirm.title: Device verification
device_confirm.subtitle: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it to confirm this login.
device_confirm.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Return to login.
device_confirm.error_invalid: Incorrect or expired code. Check your email.

session.expired: Session expired, please sign in again.
session.expired_remember_me: Your long-lived session has expired, please sign in again.

password.title: Change my password
password.subtitle: Choose a new, secure password for your account.
password.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

email.title: Change email address
email.subtitle: A confirmation link will be sent to the new address.
email.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
email.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
email.sent_body: If the address is available, a confirmation link valid for 24 hours has been sent to the new address you provided.
email.sent_instruction_1: Open the email received at the new address and click the confirmation link.
email.sent_instruction_2: The link is valid for 24 hours and can only be used once.
email.sent_instruction_3: Your current address stays active until you confirm the change.

confirm.success_body: Your new email address is now active. You can use it to sign in.
confirm.invalid_body: This confirmation link is not valid.
confirm.expired_body: This confirmation link has expired (24-hour validity). Please request a new email change.
confirm.already_used_body: This confirmation link has already been used or is no longer valid.
confirm.target_taken_body: This email address is now associated with another account. Please choose a different address.
confirm.rate_limited_body: Too many confirmation attempts. Please try again later.
confirm.error_body: The email change could not be confirmed right now. Please try again later.

profile.avatar_error_too_large: Image too large. Maximum size: 2 MB.
profile.avatar_error_generic: Could not upload the image. Please try again.
profile.email_hint: The email address cannot be changed here.
profile.error_save_generic: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.

preferences.hint: This language will be used for the interface and emails.
preferences.error_save_generic: Could not update the language. Please try again.

list.subtitle: Review the devices signed in to your account and revoke any you don't recognize.

list.revoke_aria: Revoke the session from {{ device }} on {{ date }}

confirm.message_one: This session will be signed out immediately. Continue?
confirm.message_all: All your other active sessions will be signed out. This action cannot be undone. Continue?

toast.revoke_error: Couldn't revoke this session. Please try again.
toast.revoked_all: All other sessions have been revoked
toast.revoke_all_error: Couldn't revoke the other sessions. Please try again.

list.subtitle: Trust a device so you no longer need to confirm your identity with a code every time you sign in from it.

list.revoke_aria: Revoke trust for {{ device }} since {{ date }}

confirm.title: Revoke this trusted device?
confirm.message: This device will no longer be recognized as trusted: the next sign-in from it will require a verification code again. Continue?

toast.revoke_error: Couldn't revoke this device. Please try again.

export.title: Export my data
export.subtitle: Download an archive of your personal data held by PIVOT (right to data portability, GDPR art. 20).
export.load_error: Could not check your export status. Please try again.
export.received_estimate: You will receive an email within a few minutes with a download link.
export.ready_notice: Your last export is ready: check your inbox (link valid until {{ time }}).
export.failed_notice: Generating your last export failed. You can request a new one.

toast.error_generic: An error occurred while requesting your export. Please try again.
toast.already_pending: An export request is already in progress.
toast.rate_limited: You already requested an export recently.

live.idle: You can request an export of your data.
live.received: Request received. You will receive an email within a few minutes.
live.ready: Your export is ready, check your inbox.
live.rate_limited: An export was already requested recently; a new one will be possible later.

download.title: Downloading your export
download.error_forbidden: This download link is not linked to your account.
download.error_not_found: Download link not found or already used.
download.error_generic: Could not download your export. Please try again later.

deletion.danger_zone_body: Deleting your account is permanent and irreversible. All your personal data will be deleted or anonymized once the grace period ends.
deletion.step1_message: This action is irreversible. Once the grace period ends, the following data will be deleted or anonymized:
deletion.data_item_profile: Your first name, last name and avatar
deletion.data_item_email: Your email address, replaced with an anonymized address
deletion.data_item_sessions: All your active sessions, revoked immediately
deletion.data_item_grace: Your data stays as-is during the grace period, then is permanently anonymized
deletion.password_intro: Enter your current password to confirm permanent deletion of your account.
deletion.otp_intro: A 6-digit code has been emailed to you. Enter it to confirm permanent deletion of your account.
deletion.otp_sent: A code has been sent to your email address.
deletion.error_load_method: Could not check your confirmation method. Please try again.
deletion.error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
deletion.error_conflict: An account deletion is already in progress.
deletion.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
deletion.banner_message: Your account will be permanently deleted on {{ date }}.
deletion.cancel_page_intro: You are about to cancel your account deletion. Click the button below to confirm.
deletion.cancel_page_missing_token: This cancellation link is invalid: the token is missing.
deletion.cancel_page_success_body: Your account deletion has been cancelled. You can sign in again.
deletion.cancel_page_error_expired: This cancellation link has expired: your account has already been anonymized.
deletion.cancel_page_error_invalid: This cancellation link is invalid or has already been used.
